head.title: SpellFix, On-device correction and translation for your computer
head.description: Double-tap the Option key. Your text is corrected on-device, no data ever leaves your computer. Correction, reshaping and translation for macOS.

social.og_image_alt: SpellFix — On-device correction and translation for macOS

hero.title:
Fix any text,
anywhere on your computer.
hero.sub: Double-tap the Option key. Your text is corrected on-device, no data ever leaves your computer.
hero.badge_aria: Download on the Mac App Store
hero.badge_alt: Download on the Mac App Store

mail.subject: Follow-Up on Budget Update
mail.body_html: I wanted to reccomendrecommend that we defenitelydefinitely schedule the meeting for next weakweek to discusdiscuss the bugetbudget.

how.title: Three steps, one gesture.
how.step1_body: In an email, a document, a note, any app.
how.step2_body: A universal shortcut, active everywhere in macOS.
how.step3_body: The correction replaces the original and is already on your clipboard.

correction.title: Clean corrections, in a single gesture.
correction.body: Grammar, spelling, conjugation. SpellFix fixes your text and auto-copies it to the clipboard. Nothing is ever sent to the internet.
correction.demo_input: Dear team, I wanted to reccomend that we defenitely schedule the meeting for next weak to discus the buget.
correction.demo_output_default: Dear team, I wanted to recommend that we definitely schedule the meeting for next week to discuss the budget.

tones.title: Reshape your tone.
tones.body: Professional, concise, friendly, or create a custom button like "Molière", just for fun. Tones are fully customizable: add your own, remove the ones you don't use.
tones.demo_aria: SpellFix app preview: tone reshaping, interactive
tones.demo_input: Dear team, I wanted to recommend that we definitely schedule the meeting for next week to discuss the budget.
tones.demo_output_default: Dear team, I would like to propose that we arrange a meeting next week to review the budget.
tones.demo_tone1_output: Dear team, I would like to propose that we arrange a meeting next week to review the budget.
tones.demo_tone2_output: Team — let's schedule a meeting next week to discuss the budget.
tones.demo_tone3_output: Hey team! Let's set up a meeting next week to chat about the budget.
tones.demo_tone4_output: Esteemed fellows, I doth propose that we ascertain the convening of our council meeting next week to deliberate upon the matter of the purse.

translation.title: Translate without opening a tab.
translation.body: Automatic source-language detection, translation to any target you pick. All local, all within your clipboard flow.
translation.demo_input: I'll be out of office all next week.
translation.demo_output_default: Je serai absent du bureau toute la semaine prochaine.

local_ai.title: AI that lives on your computer.
local_ai.body: SpellFix uses Apple Foundation Model by default, native to your computer. You can download extra models (Qwen, Gemma, SmolLM, etc) as needed. No model requires an internet connection, once installed.

privacy.title: No data ever leaves your computer.
privacy.bullet1: Zero network calls for correction or translation.
privacy.bullet2: No logs, no trackers, no analytics on your text.
privacy.bullet3: Verifiable with any firewall tool (Little Snitch, LuLu): zero outbound traffic during use.

pricing.title:
One purchase. Forever.
No subscription.
pricing.free_watermark: Watermark on output : "— Corrected by SpellFix"
pricing.footnote: The Pro trial starts automatically at install. For 7 days, SpellFix produces output without a watermark. After that, the app remains free, the watermark appears unless you own the Pro version.

faq.title: Straight answers, no watermark.
faq.a1: Yes. Correction and translation run locally on your computer. No data is sent over the internet.
faq.a2: By default, Apple Foundation Model, preinstalled on Apple Silicon Macs running macOS 26 and later. You can add other local models (Qwen 3.5, Gemma 4, SmolLM3) from the settings.
faq.a3: No. No network request is made during correction or translation. You can verify this with Little Snitch or any equivalent tool.
faq.q4: Does SpellFix work in every app?
faq.a4: Yes. The ⌥⌥ shortcut (customizable) is global: Mail, Notes, Safari, Word, Slack, Figma, everywhere.
faq.q5: Can I customize the tone buttons?
faq.a5: Yes. In the settings, you can add, remove, or edit tones. Your layout is yours.
faq.q6: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.a6:
All features are identical.
The only difference: the free version appends a small "— Corrected by SpellFix" watermark to generated text. The first 7 days are on Pro, watermark-free.
faq.q7: Is it really a one-time purchase?
faq.a7: Yes. $24 once and it's yours forever. No subscription, no resale, no renewal.
faq.a8: Apple's App Store rules apply. You can request a refund from Apple directly within 14 days.

footer.tagline: Local correction and translation, on your computer.
